name: Venture X Rewards Credit Card
perks: 10x miles on hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel
5x miles on flights booked through Capital One Travel
$300 annual travel credit for bookings via Capital One Travel
10,000 bonus miles every account anniversary (worth $100 in travel)
Unlimited Priority Pass lounge access for cardholder and up to 2 guests
Global Entry or TSA PreCheck credit (up to $120 every 4 years)
Up to $100 experience credit at Premier Collection hotels
Miles transfer to 15+ airline and hotel partners
drawbacks: Best rates require booking through Capital One Travel portal
Lounge access restricted to Priority Pass and Capital One Lounges
No airline-specific perks (free checked bags, priority boarding)
75,000 mile bonus subject to portal booking requirement
